update:
You can deploy instances in the  asia-southeast3  (Bangkok) 
region.

Memorystore for Memcached is being deprecated and will be shut down on January 31, 2029. After February 1, 2027, you can't create Memorystore for Memcached instances in new projects unless these instances already exist in these projects. We recommend that you migrate your workloads to  Memorystore for Valkey , which offers superior performance and features.
You can now use Cloud Logging to query and view maintenance logs for a Memorystore for Memcached instance. For more information, see  View maintenance logs . This feature is  Generally Available .
Memorystore is available in the  europe-north2  (Stockholm) region. For more information, see  Regions and zones .
Added new Memorystore for Memcached  region : Querétaro ( northamerica-south1 ).
Added new Memorystore for Memcached  region : Johannesburg ( africa-south1 ).
The  Version Upgrade  feature is now Generally Available on Memorystore for Memcached.
Added new Memorystore for Memcached  region : Dammam ( me-central2 ).
Added support for  Creating a Memcached instance that uses a specific IP address range .
Added support for  Committed use discounts  for Memorystore.
Added new Memorystore for Memcached  region : Tel Aviv ( me-west1 ).
Added new Memorystore for Memcached  region : Dallas ( us-south1 ).
Added new Memorystore for Memcached  region : Columbus ( us-east5 ).
Added new Memorystore for Memcached  region : Madrid ( europe-southwest1 ).
Added new Memorystore for Memcached  region : Paris ( europe-west9 ).
Added new Memorystore for Memcached  region : Milan ( europe-west8 ).
Maintenance Windows  are now Generally Available for Memorystore for Memcached.
Newly created Memorystore for Memcached instances now have a default Reserved Memory percentage of 10%. For more information, see  Reserved Memory .
Added new Memorystore for Memcached  region : Toronto ( northamerica-northeast2 ).
Added new Memorystore for Memcached  region : Delhi ( asia-south2 ).
Added new Memorystore for Memcached  region : Melbourne ( australia-southeast2 ).
Added support for the Reserved Memory configuration for Memorystore for Memcached. For more information, see  Memory management best practices .
Added new Memorystore for Memcached  region : Warsaw ( europe-central2 ).
General Availability release of Memorystore for Memcached.

Added new Memorystore for Memcached  regions : Finland ( europe-north1 ), Hong Kong ( asia-east2 ), Jakarta ( asia-southeast2 ), Las Vegas ( us-west4 ), Montréal ( northamerica-northeast1 ), Mumbai ( asia-south1 ), Osaka ( asia-northeast2 ), Salt Lake City ( us-west3 ), São Paulo ( southamerica-east1 ), Seoul ( asia-northeast3 ), and Zurich ( europe-west6 ).
Beta release of Memorystore for Memcached.
